positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a vibrant, abstract forest scene. The main subject is a group of interlocking geometric leaves and branches rendered in deep emerald green, sapphire blue, and gold metallic accents. The composition is highly symmetrical and circular, suitable for a central apparel placement. The style is graphic novel meets art deco, featuring strong, clean silhouettes and high contrast. Use negative space effectively to create depth. The lighting should be ethereal and dramatic, casting sharp, defined shadows. The overall mood is whimsical and luxurious. Vector art quality, high detail, print-ready resolution.
negative: blur, noisy, low-resolution, text, signature, watermark, logo, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, artifacts, photorealistic, ugly, cropped, out of frame
